title: Hardeep Puri Meets Qatar Minister for Energy Affairs in Doha, Discusses Energy Ties Amid West Asia Tensions, Welcomes Ceasefire
description: Minister of Petroleum and Natural Gas Hardeep Puri arrived in Doha on Friday afternoon for a two-day official visit, according to the Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas. In the evening, he met Qatar's Minister of State for Energy Affairs and President and CEO of QatarEnergy, Saad Sherida Al-Kaabi
